description: تثبيت المكتبات الأساسية: PySide6, SQLAlchemy, pydantic, pyinstaller
command_preview: Set-Location 'C:\TaskManager'; & '.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -m pip install --upgrade pip; & '.venv\Scripts\pip.exe' install PySide6 SQLAlchemy pydantic pyinstaller; & '.venv\Scripts\pip.exe' freeze | Out-File -FilePath 'requirements.txt' -Encoding utf8; Write-Output 'SUCCESS: Libraries installed and requirements.txt created'

SUCCESS: Libraries installed and requirements.txt created
